subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from the One who is Remembered be unto him who hath been remembered before the Throne, the seat of his Lord, the Mighty, the All-Wise, that God's remembrance may strengthen him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المذکور لمن ذکر لدی العرش مقر ربه العزیز الحکیم لیویده ذکر الله
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
